Off Calendar Oct-05-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for a default prove-up hearing in Department 611. Gary Royce, Esq. appeared on behalf of plaintiff who was also present. Court, having heard testimony, signed the interlocutory Judgment of Partition of real property by sale in open court
Judge: Diane Elan Wick; Reporter: Sonia Wong; Clerk: Rani Edwards ( Dept. 611 )
